compiled_state.title: Write RED tests and implement check-referential-integrity.sh for file-existence linting
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What
Write a failing test suite for check-referential-integrity.sh before implementing the script (RED-first TDD). Then implement the script.

## Context
Story b9c8-43f2 requires referential integrity linting that verifies skill-referenced scripts, agents, and contracts exist as real files. This task covers the linting script.

## Implementation Approach (from counter-proposal — Cycle 1)
**check-referential-integrity.sh** behavior:
- Scans `plugins/dso/skills/**/*.md` and `plugins/dso/agents/*.md` for path references
- Pattern to match: `plugins/dso/(scripts|agents|docs)/[^\s]+\.(sh|py|md)`
- Skips lines containing `# shim-exempt:` (case-insensitive) — existing exclusion pattern
- Checks each referenced path exists relative to REPO_ROOT (`git rev-parse --show-toplevel`)
- Exits 0 when all referenced files exist, 1 when any are missing
- Reports missing files with filename and line number
- Supports explicit file arguments (for pre-commit staged-file mode); defaults to full scan
- set -uo pipefail; no jq; bash only

## TDD Steps
1. Write `tests/scripts/test-check-referential-integrity.sh` with tests:
   - test_valid_reference: a temp .md file referencing an existing script (e.g., plugins/dso/scripts/check-shim-refs.sh) → exit 0
   - test_broken_reference: a temp .md file referencing plugins/dso/scripts/nonexistent-script.sh → exit 1
   - test_broken_reference_reported: exit 1 AND output contains the broken reference
   - test_shim_exempt_skipped: a line with broken reference + # shim-exempt: → exit 0
   - test_broken_agent_reference: referencing plugins/dso/agents/nonexistent.md → exit 1
   - test_broken_contract_reference: referencing plugins/dso/docs/contracts/nonexistent.md → exit 1
   - test_no_references: a clean .md file with no path patterns → exit 0
2. Run test: confirm RED (script does not exist)
3. Implement `plugins/dso/scripts/check-referential-integrity.sh`
4. chmod +x the new script
5. Run test: confirm GREEN
6. Run `bash plugins/dso/scripts/check-referential-integrity.sh` against actual skill/agent files — must exit 0 (no false positives)

## Files to Modify
- CREATE: tests/scripts/test-check-referential-integrity.sh
- CREATE: plugins/dso/scripts/check-referential-integrity.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- Given tests/scripts/test-check-referential-integrity.sh is run BEFORE the script exists, When I run it, Then it exits 1 (RED)
- Given check-referential-integrity.sh is implemented, When I run the test suite, Then all tests pass (GREEN)
- Given a skill .md file referencing a real file like plugins/dso/scripts/check-shim-refs.sh, When I run check-referential-integrity.sh, Then it exits 0
- Given a skill .md file referencing plugins/dso/scripts/nonexistent.sh, When I run check-referential-integrity.sh, Then it exits 1 and reports the missing file
- Given a line with # shim-exempt: annotation, When I run check-referential-integrity.sh, Then it skips that line
- Given the actual plugins/dso/skills and plugins/dso/agents files, When I run check-referential-integrity.sh, Then it exits 0 (no false positives on current content)

## Testing Mode: RED

comments.body:
AC AMENDMENT (Gap Analysis):

Gap 1 (BLOCKING): Expand scan scope to match check-shim-refs.sh's set:
  plugins/dso/{skills,agents,docs/workflows,docs/prompts}/**/*.md plus CLAUDE.md
  NOT just skills/**/*.md and agents/*.md

Gap 2 (BLOCKING): In-flight rename handling:
  Add test case: file renamed (git mv) + reference updated in same staged commit should pass.
  Implementation must resolve referenced paths against staged working tree (not just filesystem).
  Use 'git ls-files --cached' or check working tree path after staged rename.

Gap 4 (NON-BLOCKING): Code fence handling:
  Add test case: a path inside a fenced code block (triple backtick).
  Design decision: skip paths inside code fences () to avoid false positives on illustrative examples.
  Document in script comments.
comments.author: Test

comments.body:
AC AMENDMENT Gap 1 (BLOCKING): Expand scan scope. Match check-shim-refs.sh: scan plugins/dso/skills, agents, docs/workflows, docs/prompts recursively plus CLAUDE.md. Not just skills and agents.

AC AMENDMENT Gap 2 (BLOCKING): In-flight rename handling. Add test case for staged rename plus reference update in same commit passing. Implementation resolves referenced paths against staged working tree using git ls-files --cached.

AC AMENDMENT Gap 4 (NON-BLOCKING): Code fence handling. Skip paths inside triple-backtick fenced code blocks. Add test case for path in code fence. Document in script comments.
comments.author: Test

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-check-referential-integrity.sh exits 1 before script exists (RED)
  Verify: test ! -f plugins/dso/scripts/check-referential-integrity.sh
- [ ] All test cases pass after implementation (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-check-referential-integrity.sh
- [ ] check-referential-integrity.sh exits 0 on actual skill/agent files
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/scripts/check-referential-integrity.sh
- [ ] Script detects broken references
  Verify: echo 'plugins/dso/scripts/nonexistent.sh' > /tmp/test-ri.md && bash plugins/dso/scripts/check-referential-integrity.sh /tmp/test-ri.md; test $? -eq 1
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood (files read: tests/scripts/test-check-referential-integrity.sh, plugins/dso/scripts/check-shim-refs.sh, plugins/dso/scripts/check-portability.sh, tests/lib/assert.sh; exemplars read: check-shim-refs.sh, check-portability.sh) ✓
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written ✓ (RED confirmed: 4 passed, 6 failed — script not found exit 127)
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ (tests: 10 passed, 0 failed; full repo scan: exit 0, no false positives)
comments.author: Test

comments.body:
CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓

AC verification:
1. tests exit 1 before script exists (RED) — confirmed (exit 127, 6 failures)
2. All test cases pass after implementation (GREEN) — confirmed (10 passed, 0 failed)
3. check-referential-integrity.sh exits 0 on actual skill/agent files — confirmed (full scan exit 0)
4. Script detects broken references — confirmed (test_broken_reference, test_broken_reference_reported pass)
5. shim-exempt annotation skips line — confirmed (test_shim_exempt_skipped passes)
6. No false positives on current content — confirmed (full repo scan exit 0)

Additional AC from amendments:
- Expanded scan scope (skills, agents, docs/workflows, docs/prompts, CLAUDE.md) — implemented
- In-flight rename handling via git ls-files --cached — implemented
- Code fence handling (skip paths inside triple backticks) — implemented (test_code_fence_skipped passes)
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Fixed: check-referential-integrity.sh implemented with 10-test suite, all passing
comments.author: Test
